ActionPlanSection.title: The plan behind SEDES
ActionPlanSection.text: SEDES is part of the Brazilian Action Plan to Combat Desertification and Mitigate the Effects of Drought (PAB-Brazil), launched by the Ministry of Environment and Climate Change in December 2025. It is the main implementation instrument of the PNCD, with a horizon through 2045. SEDES corresponds to Objective 2.4 of the plan, under the "Research, innovation and information management" axis.

axesSection.title: Thematic axes
axesSection.sedesHere: SEDES is active in this axis

0.title: Sustainable land management and land degradation neutrality

1.title: Climate adaptation and mitigation of drought effects
